title: May 20, 2026 — Meta's Muse Spark, Trump-Xi summit, Fed's Warsh era begins
description:
Today's briefing:
• Meta debuts Muse Spark, first AI model from Superintelligence Labs under Alexandr Wang
• Trump-Xi Beijing summit produces soybean and Boeing deals, Taiwan warning remains sharp
• AI shopping referral conversions up over 1,200 percent — the channel is now real
• Kevin Warsh takes Fed helm, 30-year yield tops 5 percent, rate cuts off the table
• First commercial orbital outpost launches this month as private space era begins

Sections:
00:00 Open
00:40 AI and Tech
09:40 World News
13:40 DTC and Ecommerce
17:20 Markets
19:45 Science

title: May 19, 2026 — Anthropic tops OpenAI, Iran oil spike, DTC CAC crisis
description:
Today's briefing:
• Anthropic in talks to raise fifty billion dollars at a valuation topping OpenAI, plus ten new financial services agents
• Trump heads to Beijing for first US presidential visit to China since twenty seventeen
• DTC customer acquisition costs up forty to sixty percent — first-order economics are broken
• Fed holds eight to four, Brent crude near one hundred and twenty dollars per barrel
• World's first commercial orbital outpost launches this month

Sections:
00:00 Open
00:45 AI & Tech
10:00 World News
14:00 DTC & Ecommerce
18:00 Markets
21:00 Science

title: May 18, 2026 — Nvidia week, Project Glasswing, and the DTC reset
description: Nvidia earnings set the tone for the AI trade as the Fed leadership changes hands. Anthropic gates its Mythos Preview model behind Project Glasswing while OpenAI launches its Frontier enterprise platform. Plus, the DTC unit economics shift and the geopolitical risks now moving oil.

title: May 17, 2026 — Mythos vs Daybreak, Iran inflation, iOS 26 attribution
description: Anthropic's Claude Mythos cybersecurity model faces off against OpenAI Daybreak as the AI arms race accelerates. Markets pulled back Friday on Iran inflation fears and a lukewarm Trump-Xi summit, while iOS 26 fingerprinting changes deliver the biggest DTC attribution disruption since iOS 14.

title: May 16, 2026 — Anthropic's 80x growth, Cerebras IPO, Strait of Hormuz
description: Anthropic's eighty times quarterly revenue growth forces a compute deal with SpaceXAI's Colossus data center. Cerebras surges sixty-eight percent in the biggest tech IPO since Uber. Markets sell off Friday as the Trump-Xi summit disappoints and Treasury yields spike on Strait of Hormuz tensions.

title: May 15, 2026 — Anthropic restricts Mythos, indexes hit records, iOS 26 hits attribution
description: Anthropic limits its new Claude Mythos Preview to vetted enterprises over cybersecurity risk. The S&P 500, Nasdaq, and Dow all closed at record highs on 25% earnings growth and the H200 export thaw. iOS 26's fingerprinting protection is materially degrading default Meta and Google attribution for DTC brands.
